title: PARALLAX-5 Mapping Protocol v1
description: Defines the schema that any registered tool-mapping must satisfy. The mapping protocol enables a registry of named mappings — AquaUrsa Research publishes the reference mapping aquaursa-v1; other authors may publish their own mappings under tool-mapping/{author}-v{major} namespaces. The PARALLAX-5 coordinator accepts certificates referencing any conforming mapping; the certificate names which mapping was used (per certificate_v1.json §mapping). License: CC0.

namespace.description: Globally unique mapping identifier in the form tool-mapping/{author}-v{major}. The {author} segment is lower-case ASCII identifying the mapping authority; {major} segment is the integer major version. Examples: tool-mapping/aquaursa-v1, tool-mapping/trailofbits-v1.

version.description: Semver string. Major bumps signal an incompatible change in coverage interpretation; minor bumps add tools or refine depth values; patch bumps fix justification text or typos. The major component must match the namespace's -v{major} suffix.

license.description: SPDX license identifier. The PARALLAX-5 Non-Capturability Charter (Article 2) requires registered mappings to use a license compatible with public reuse (CC0, CC-BY, Apache-2.0, MIT). License: CC0-1.0 is recommended for mappings entering the registry.

publication.description: Where this mapping is permanently published. Authors are expected to deposit each major version on Zenodo or an equivalent permanent archive; the DOI may then be cited from certificates that use this mapping.

doi_target.description: DOI for this version, or 'to-be-assigned-on-deposit' if not yet published.

depth_legend.description: The six-level monotone evidence-depth ladder. The legend keys are stringified integers 0..5; the values are descriptions. All registered mappings share the same depth ladder; this field is here so that consumers of the mapping document do not need to reference the substrate paper separately.

obligation_legend.description: Short labels for the five PARALLAX-5 obligations. All registered mappings share the same five obligations.

tool_capabilities.description: Maps tool identifier → tool capability. Each tool capability contains (a) the tool's pinned version, (b) the URL to documentation for the tool's findings, (c) a list of mapping entries, each translating a tool-native finding identifier to an (obligation, depth, justification) triple.

compositional_examples.description: Worked examples illustrating how this mapping aggregates per-tool capabilities into joint capability per the substrate's Compositional Coverage Theorem (Parallax5/Compositional.lean).

open_problems.description: Known limitations of this mapping that authors flag for community refinement.
